description_long: This is a classic living room furniture set consisting of a three-seater sofa, two matching armchairs, and a rectangular coffee table. The seating pieces are upholstered in dark brown leather with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and feature deep button tufting on the backrests for a traditional, elegant look. The armrests are generously padded and rolled, with subtle decorative accents on the sides. The coffee table is made of dark wood, rectangular in shape, and has a simple, sturdy design with straight legs. The sofa and chairs have short, rounded legs that are only slightly visible beneath the upholstery. The overall set exudes a sense of comfort and sophistication, suitable for upscale urban interiors or waiting areas.
description: A dark brown leather sofa set with tufted backs, rolled armrests, and a matching wooden coffee table, exuding classic elegance and comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three-seater sofa, two armchairs, and the coffee table arranged in a welcoming, symmetrical layout.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side profile of the sofa, the armchair's back, and the coffee table's length.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sofa and armchairs, with the coffee table positioned in front.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the back of one armchair, the sofa's side, and the coffee table's surface.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, attached seat cushions and three tufted, attached back cushions on the sofa; single seat and back cushions on each armchair, all uniform in size and style.
attribute_armrest_style: Present on all seating pieces, the armrests are high, thick, and rolled with visible padding and subtle decorative side accents.
attribute_leg_design: Short, rounded legs positioned at the corners, made of dark wood, mostly recessed and only slightly visible beneath the upholstery.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrests with deep button tufting, slightly curved for comfort, and attached to the frame.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown leather with a smooth, glossy finish and deep button tufting on the backrests for added texture.
